title: NutriPaw Pre, Pro & Postbiotic Digestive Treats For Dogs - Gut Health, Sensitive Tums, Anal Glands, Scooting, Loose Stools, Smelly, Itchy Ears, Great for all dogs
features: UK's Most Loved Probiotic & Digestive Chew (6K+ 5* Reviews) - A tasty chew formulated to deliver digestive support, bum scooting/ anal gland support, soothe itchy, dirty, smelly ears & support gut health
Loved by 500,000+ Dogs – Trusted by 500,000+ UK dog owners to support their dog’s health by supporting sensitive tummies, soothing itchy ears, grass eating, and maintain healthy bowel movements.

No More Force-Feeding Tablets – Packed with world-class, expertly chosen natural ingredients, these irresistible, meaty treats are a hit with even the fussiest eaters. Loved by thousands of dogs, they make supporting your dog’s health easy and enjoyable—no more battles at mealtime!

Best-in-Class Ingredients – Packed with billions of CFUs and featuring 8 powerful, scientifically proven ingredients, including probiotics, clinically backed postbiotics, digestive gut health blends, chicory root, and more. These chews provide unmatched support for your dog’s digestive health and overall well-being!
"They stopped my dog eating grass, reduced his bum scooting, cleared up his ears and soothed his sensitive tummy" - Dan
description: Product Description How the Pre, Probiotic & Postbiotic Treats can support your Dog: Made from 100% Natural Ingredients Probiotics & Epicor Probiotics & Epicor support your dog's gut health! They maintain digestive balance, reducing bum scooting , & soothing itchy ears naturally Dried Pumpkin & Papaya Pumpkin provides vital fibre for digestion , while Papaya's enzymes soothe tummies and prevent bum scoot . Flaxseed & Chicory Root Flaxseed is rich in fibre supporting digestion , while Chicory Root supports a balanced gut and bum scooting . Pineapple & Plum Powder Plum powder & Pineapple aid healthy bum gland function & maintain normal stools to naturally express the glands The UK's Most-Loved Probiotics For Dogs The video showcases the product in use.
